PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-02-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Tachiki for Diana Lee.

Mr. Tachiki stated that he recently joined a different firm, that he filed a substitution of attorney on December 17th (courtesy copy provided), that at the time when he filed the petition he was still waiting for full distribution from Tom's estate and that Tom's estate has a hearing set for January 28, 2019. Mr. Tachiki also stated that once they receive the assets they will need to do a 706 (estate tax return), that he believes his Client is already working on that, and that they will then be waiting for a letter from the Internal Revenue Service. The Court granted the Second Report on Status of Administration, etc. (subject to review of the order). The Court informed Counsel that a new status hearing date on close of the estate will be included in the order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-21-2018 Continued To Dec-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jeffrey Tachiki for Diana Lee (Petitioner)

Mr. Tachiki stated the there has been back and forth with the referee over the course of the last month, Mr. Mahoney received completed information 1 and 1/2 week ago to appraise value of estate. The second report of status of administration and status hearing re closing of estate are continued to December 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: A. Santiago. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-21-2018 Continued To Dec-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Continued To Nov-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Continued To Nov-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Tachiki for Diana Lee.

Mr. Tachiki stated that this is a strange probate, that the only asset is the Decedent's interest in the Brother's estate, that he is not sure what the ultimate value is, that he had a discussion with the Probate Referee and that the Referee stated that he can not ascertain what the value is until all of the fees in the Brother's estate are paid. The Court stated that an inventory can still be done and that a right to receive an asset has a value. Mr. Tachiki informed the Court that a hearing on final distribution in the estate of Wah Fong (Brother) is set for October 10, 2018. The Second Report on Status of Administration, etc. is continued to November 21, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate of set for November 14, 2018 is also continued to November 21, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
